features_added: IWSDK 0.4.1 project scaffolding with dual-runtime (XR + browser)
Standard dartboard with accurate geometry (20 segments, singles/doubles/triples rings, inner/outer bull)
Dartboard scoring math (segment detection by angle, ring detection by distance)
Neon holodeck dartboard: glowing rings, wire dividers, colored segments (red/green alternating doubles/triples)
Dart creation with neon barrel, sharp tip, magenta flights, cyan glow
Charge-and-release throw mechanic with power mapping
Dart flight with gravity, trail rendering, and board intersection
Natural scatter system (throw accuracy scales with power)
4 game modes: 501 (double-out finish), Cricket (close 15-20+bulls), Around the Clock (1-20 sequence), Shanghai (round-number scoring, instant-win on S+D+T)
501 bust rule: exceeding remainder or finishing without a double resets turn score
Cricket mark tracking with point scoring on opponent's open numbers
AI opponent with 3 difficulty levels (Easy/Medium/Hard) — noise-based accuracy model
AI targeting: strategic 501 (T20 for big scores, double setup for finish), Cricket (close highest first, then score), Around the Clock (target sequence), Shanghai (triple of round number)
VR controller input: right trigger charge/release throw, controller ray aim at board, B pause, A confirm
Browser input: mouse aim via raycaster, left-click charge/release, ESC pause
13 PanelUI .uikitml spatial UI templates, zero HTML DOM
Head-following HUD (Follower + PivotY): mode, player, score, round, darts remaining, turn score
Head-following power bar with filled/empty block display and percentage
Head-following message toast for game events and achievement notifications

World-space panels: title screen, mode select (4 modes with descriptions), difficulty select, pause, game over, leaderboard (top 10), achievements (20 slots), settings (volume controls), help (browser+VR controls, rules), stats (10 metrics)

Procedural Web Audio: throw whoosh (bandpass filtered noise), board hit thud (square wave + decay), score chimes (ascending frequencies for doubles/triples/bulls), miss thud, game start fanfare, win/lose music, achievement arpeggio, button click, turn change pip, ambient drone (55Hz sine + triangle pad + LFO)
Hit particle effects: colored sparks at dart impact point (12 particles, color by multiplier), gravity + fade

20 achievements: First Steps, Bulls Eye, Top Score, 180!, Winner, Hat Trick, Regular (5 wins), Veteran (10 wins), Cricket Closer, Shanghai, Clock Master, Perfect Leg, Sharpshooter, Double or Nothing, Centurion (100 games), Ton Plus, Precision, Triple Threat, AI Slayer, Versatile (all modes)
Achievement toast notification system with celebratory audio
Statistics tracker: games, wins, darts thrown, accuracy, bullseyes, triples, doubles, 180s, best turn, average turn, mode-specific wins
Leaderboard with localStorage persistence

Holodeck neon environment: grid floor/ceiling with thin beam lines, back wall with border glow, oche (throw line) with magenta glow, side pillars with top spheres, 16 floating wireframe decorations (torus/box/sphere/cone), 50 ambient particles, fog, 3 colored board spotlights (cyan/magenta/green)
Board backing cylinder behind face for depth
Interactive settings: volume +/- buttons for Master, SFX, Music with real-time audio control
GitHub repo created and deployed to GitHub Pages
Comprehensive README with controls, modes, features, project structure, build stats

features_completed: 4 game modes (501, Cricket, Around the Clock, Shanghai)
Dart throw mechanic with power control
